name: Instacart
description: Let agents create Instacart shopping list and recipe links for user-reviewed checkout through Instacart Marketplace.

access.label: Instacart Developer Platform
access.detail: Requires an Instacart Developer Platform API key where the agent or MCP client runs. The public Developer Platform and MCP path creates shoppable recipe or shopping-list pages; user checkout still happens on Instacart Marketplace. Direct order creation is a separate Instacart Connect retailer-partner workflow and must not be treated as a general consumer ordering API.

tools.name: INSTACART_API_KEY
tools.detail: Instacart Developer Platform key used as a Bearer token.

tools.name: Instacart MCP server
tools.detail: Official Instacart MCP surface for recipe and shopping-list tools.

tools.name: Create shopping list page
tools.detail: Create a Marketplace shopping-list URL for human checkout review.

tools.name: Nearby retailers
tools.detail: List nearby retailer banners for planning.

endpoints.name: Instacart MCP development
endpoints.detail: Development MCP endpoint requiring an Authorization bearer token.

endpoints.name: Instacart MCP production
endpoints.detail: Production MCP endpoint requiring approved production access.

endpoints.name: products-link
endpoints.detail: Creates a Marketplace shopping-list page for human review.

endpoints.name: nearby-retailers
endpoints.detail: Lists nearby retailer banners for planning.

capabilities.name: INSTACART_API_KEY
capabilities.detail: Instacart Developer Platform key used as a Bearer token. Never print, log, or commit this value.

capabilities.name: Instacart MCP server
capabilities.detail: Development URL: https://mcp.dev.instacart.tools/mcp. Production URL: https://mcp.instacart.com/mcp. Requires Authorization bearer token.

capabilities.name: Create shopping list page
capabilities.detail: POST /idp/v1/products/products_link creates a Marketplace shopping-list URL that the user reviews, adds to cart, and checks out from.

capabilities.name: Nearby retailers
capabilities.detail: GET /idp/v1/retailers?postal_code=...&country_code=US|CA lists nearby retailer banners for planning.

variables.label: Environment
variables.value: development or production Instacart API/MCP endpoint

variables.label: Checkout rule
variables.value: human reviews cart, delivery details, substitutions, and total before paying

steps.title: Get API access
steps.detail: Apply for Instacart Developer Platform access and create a development key in the Instacart Developer Dashboard.

steps.title: Test MCP connection
steps.detail: Use MCP inspector against https://mcp.dev.instacart.tools/mcp with Authorization set to a Bearer token, then verify create-recipe and create-shopping-list tools are listed.

steps.title: Generate a shopping handoff
steps.detail: Have the agent create a recipe or shopping-list page from the user's requested items, then send the returned Instacart URL for human review.

steps.title: Install the building
steps.detail: Add Instacart to Agent Town after the key, endpoint, and checkout-confirmation rule are documented.

agentGuide.summary: Use Instacart when an agent needs to turn grocery requests, recipes, or meal plans into an Instacart Marketplace shopping-list or recipe link for user-reviewed checkout.
useCases: Create a shoppable Instacart list from a user's grocery request or meal plan.
Use the official Instacart MCP server so the agent can call create-recipe or create-shopping-list without hand-writing API payloads.
Check nearby retailer banners by postal code before preparing a shopping handoff.
Explain that the user must complete checkout on Instacart Marketplace unless there is a separate authorized Connect retailer integration.
setup: Confirm INSTACART_API_KEY is available only in the agent runtime or MCP client configuration; never write it to the Library, result docs, screenshots, or commits.
Use the development API or MCP endpoint until the integration is reviewed and a production key is approved.
For public Developer Platform use, create a shopping list or recipe URL and hand it to the user for cart review and checkout.
Do not place or imply final orders, payments, age-restricted purchases, substitutions, tips, or delivery windows without explicit human confirmation in the active conversation.

Treat Instacart Connect Fulfillment order creation as retailer-partner infrastructure only; use it only when the workspace already has authorized retailer credentials, catalog/store setup, and a customer checkout flow.

commands.label: Read generated guide
commands.detail: Start here before using the building from an agent session.

commands.label: Inspect MCP server
commands.detail: Set Transport Type to Streamable HTTP, URL to https://mcp.dev.instacart.tools/mcp, and Authorization to a Bearer token.

commands.label: Set development API base
commands.detail: Use the production base URL only after Instacart approves production access.

commands.label: Create shopping list page
commands.detail: Payload should include title and line_items with line_item_measurements.

commands.label: List nearby retailers
commands.detail: Use the user's postal code only when they have provided it for this task.

env.name: INSTACART_API_KEY
env.detail: Instacart Developer Platform API key used as Authorization bearer token.

env.name: INSTACART_API_BASE_URL
env.detail: Optional REST base URL. Defaults should be development https://connect.dev.instacart.tools until production approval.

env.name: INSTACART_MCP_URL
env.detail: Optional MCP URL, usually https://mcp.dev.instacart.tools/mcp for development or https://mcp.instacart.com/mcp for production.

env.name: INSTACART_POSTAL_CODE
env.detail: Only set from a postal code the user provided for the current grocery task.

env.name: INSTACART_COUNTRY_CODE
env.detail: US or CA. Defaults to US in the sample command.
